topTopic.name: Christopher Nolan's The Odyssey dominates box office and awards conversation
topTopic.why: Multiple headlines track The Odyssey's strong Day 2 box office (Rs 36.72cr India, Rs 45cr Day 2 total, +30% jump), cast praise (Elliot Page), venue reviews, and comparisons to Super Mario Galaxy—making it the day's dominant conversation.
